evals.prompt: Run /z-eval-execute with no flags in a repo where the LLM API key is not set.
evals.expected_output: Static pytest suite runs via pnpm run eval. No LLM cases are run. llm.yml is written under evals/_runs/<ts>/. A drift line is appended after eval:update --check.
assertions: pnpm run eval was invoked (not eval:full)
No invocation of the LLM runner occurred
A llm.yml exists under evals/_runs/<ts>/
The llm.yml contains a drift block with status in {clean, critical, unknown}

evals.prompt: Run /z-eval-execute --full --model opus-4.6 with CURSOR_API_KEY set in the environment.
evals.expected_output: Both static and LLM suites run. The LLM runner receives opus-4.6 both via --model and via ZOTO_EVAL_MODEL. llm.yml records model: opus-4.6.
assertions: pnpm run eval:full was invoked
The LLM runner received --model opus-4.6 on the CLI
The ZOTO_EVAL_MODEL environment variable was set to opus-4.6 for the child process
llm.yml contains model: opus-4.6
A drift line is appended to llm.yml after the run

evals.prompt: Run /z-eval-execute --full in a repo where CURSOR_API_KEY is missing.
evals.expected_output: The skill stops, uses askQuestion to offer either aborting or running static-only, and never invokes the LLM runner.
assertions: askQuestion was used to ask how to proceed
The LLM runner was not invoked
If the user chose static-only, pnpm run eval was invoked instead

evals.prompt: The palette ran `/z-eval-execute` with no flags. You have the execute-evals skill loaded—run the static suite end-to-end and close with the skill’s wrap-up.
assertions: Step 1 chose pnpm run eval because neither --full nor an LLM-only path applied
Step 4 used a shell subagent and streamed stdout and stderr during execution rather than hiding output until the command finished

Step 5 ran pnpm run eval:update --check and translated exit code 0 to drift status clean, exit code 2 to critical, and any other code to unknown before appending drift with status, exit_code, and message to the most recent llm.yml as warn-only overlay data
Step 6 summarized totals and aggregates such as tokens, duration, verbosity, accuracy, and confidence together with the drift line and omitted graphical charts
Conventions were respected so artefact paths referenced the eval-system layout static.yml, llm.yml, report.yml, and logs under the timestamped run directory beneath evalsDir
The workflow never called askQuestion and never modified .zoto-eval-system/config.json or .zoto-eval-system/manifest.yml
Execution stayed inside package.json scripts using pnpm run eval and pnpm run eval:update --check rather than invoking harness entrypoints directly

primitive_analysis.summary: Covers script selection for static versus full tiers, dual model forwarding, credential handling via environment and repo-root dotenv without askQuestion, shell streaming with drift stamping on llm.yml, summaries that exclude charts, honouring task credential_resolution, and locating runs via evalsDir from config.yml while leaving manifest and eval-system JSON untouched.

evals.expected_output: The assistant drives a shell run of pnpm run eval, streams combined output as it arrives, runs pnpm run eval:update --check afterward, appends a drift block to the newest llm.yml under the configured evals tree, and finishes with pass or fail counts plus token or timing style aggregates and the drift line, without charts or edits to manifest files.
